name: exo
systemHint:
You can manage conversations and do scripted LLM calls with the `exo` CLI (source at ~/Workspace/Exocortex/external-tools/exo-cli). Run `exo -h` for usage reference.
When using `exo` to spawn subagent conversations (i.e. sending a message that asks the AI to perform a task), these typically take a long time to complete. Always pass an appropriate --timeout: 300 (5 min) for simple lookups/questions, 600-1800 (10-30 min) for moderate coding/research tasks, and up to 3600 (1 hour) for complex multi-step work. The default 300s is often too short for non-trivial tasks.
